creator: freebsd.contact@marino.st
text:
This builds fine on the latest versions of FreeBSD 8, 9, and 10.
To be clear, according to Redports, this builds find on FreeBSD 9.2

The error is protrayed as a gcc 4.2 thing, but the compilers on 9.1 and
9.2 are the same.

I'm inclined to close this PR without doing anyway.  Can the submitter
give me a good reason not to?  (e.g. Is he stating it should build on
9.2 but NOT 9.1?)

John
